title: New File / New Folder buttons in FilesManager toolbar are stubs
body: handleStartEdit() in FilesManager.tsx has toast.info('Creating file… (not yet implemented)'). Wire these to actual createFile and createDirectory calls via the write API.
rationale: User-facing feature is incomplete — the context menu already implements create/new properly, but the toolbar buttons are not wired.

title: Split view in FileEditor is implemented but panel layout is manual div-based
body: The split view (viewMode === 'split') uses two side-by-side divs. Consider using react-resizable-panels (Group/Panel/Separator) for actual resizable panels, but note the package exports 'Group'/'Panel'/'Separator' not 'PanelGroup'/'Panel'/'PanelResizeHandle'.
rationale: The UI already has the split view rendered as two divs; react-resizable-panels was installed but the actual split view doesn't use it yet.
